comment: Scenario input reception is allocated to the vehicle state processor
Vehicle range estimation is allocated to the range estimator
Stopping-distance calculation is allocated to the stopping distance estimator
TTC calculation is allocated to the TTC estimator
Warning-state classification is allocated to the warning state machine
Brake-request generation is allocated to emergency brake request logic
Actuator concept selection is allocated to the actuator concept selector
Scenario pass or fail checking is allocated to the verification manager
Traceability maintenance is allocated to the traceability manager
